description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular, blocky wooden structure with a natural, slightly weathered wood grain finish. It has three spacious drawers, each with a minimalist recessed handle, providing ample storage space. The top surface is flat and sturdy, currently supporting a tall, neatly stacked pile of various books, suggesting its use as both a storage and display surface. The nightstand sits flush with the ground, lacking visible legs, giving it a solid, grounded appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a functional, utilitarian design. The overall look is practical and robust, suitable for urban interiors or transitional spaces.
description: A robust, rectangular wooden nightstand with three drawers and a stack of books on top, featuring a natural wood grain finish and minimalist recessed handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with recessed handles and a tall stack of books on the left side of the top surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the nightstand and the vertical stack of books, with no visible handles or drawer fronts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood grain back and the books stacked on the right, with no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid wood side and the vertical stack of books, with no visible handles or drawer fronts.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
